title: Component Catalog
description: Validates `.specify/design-system/components.yaml`, the agent-inferred, operator-reviewable component catalog. Each entry declares a shared UI component that the Vectis target factors into shared code at build time. The catalog is written by `specify catalog infer --phase bind` (binding the names the build skill or operator parts supply) and reviewed by the operator, who may reject or rename entries.

components.description: Map of component slugs to their metadata. Keys are kebab-case identifiers.

status.description: `confirmed` — the build should factor this as a shared component. `rejected` — the operator has decided this is not a real shared component; claims with this slug will not trigger `slice-catalog-drift` findings.

description.description: Human-readable note for operators and agents.

fingerprint.description: Structural fingerprint (lowercase SHA-256 hex) of the normalised group skeleton this slug was bound to. Recorded by `specify catalog infer --phase bind` so a later `--phase report` run can echo the bound slug for an already-named cluster (run-to-run binding stability). Optional: hand-authored entries omit it.
